# OneManCompany

> Last updated: 2026-03-18

> OneManCompany is an open-source AI operating system that lets one person run a complete company with autonomous AI employees.

## What It Is

OneManCompany is a platform — not a framework, not a chatbot wrapper, not an agent demo. It faithfully models how real companies operate: org charts, hiring/firing, task delegation, performance reviews, meeting rooms, and cost accounting. You are the CEO (the only human). Everyone else — HR, COO, engineers, designers, QA — are AI employees that think, collaborate, and deliver real work.

## Key Facts

- License: Apache 2.0 (open source)
- Install: `npx @1mancompany/onemancompany`
- Requirements: Node.js 16+, Git (Python 3.12 auto-installed)
- Platforms: macOS, Windows, Linux
- Stack: Python (FastAPI, LangChain) + Vanilla JS (Canvas 2D pixel art UI)
- Repository: https://github.com/1mancompany/OneManCompany
- Talent Market: https://one-man-company.com

## Core Architecture

- **Vessel**: Execution container (retry logic, timeouts, tool access, communication protocols)
- **Talent**: Capability package (skills, knowledge, personality, specialized tools) — sourced from the Talent Market
- **Employee**: Vessel + Talent combined. Hire from the Talent Market and the system handles onboarding.

## What You Can Build

Each AI company produces product-level deliverables through a full team of collaborating agents:
- Game studios (production games with playtesting & iteration)
- Manga studios (serialized comics with consistent art)
- Dev agencies (end-to-end software products)
- Content studios (marketing, branded content, media)
- Research labs (literature review, data analysis, reports)

## How It Works

1. CEO gives a high-level instruction (e.g., "Build a puzzle game for mobile")
2. Executive Assistant receives and routes the task
3. COO breaks it into subtasks and assigns to the right employees
4. Team members (engineers, designers, QA) work autonomously and hold meetings as needed
5. Work passes through quality gates and review checkpoints
6. CEO reviews and approves the final deliverable

## Company Features

- **Org Chart**: Hierarchical management with departments and reporting lines
- **Hiring & Firing**: HR searches Talent Market, CEO interviews candidates
- **Performance Reviews**: Quarterly scoring, probation, PIP, and promotion tracks
- **Task Delegation**: CEO → executives → employees with quality gates
- **Meeting Rooms**: Multi-agent synchronous discussions with auto-generated reports
- **Cost Accounting**: Per-project LLM token usage and USD cost tracking
- **1-on-1 Coaching**: Shape employee behavior through direct guidance
- **File Approval**: Review and approve employee file changes

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://1mancompany.github.io/OneManCompany/docs/
- Getting started: https://1mancompany.github.io/OneManCompany/docs/guide/getting-started/
- Architecture: https://1mancompany.github.io/OneManCompany/docs/reference/architecture/
- Task system: https://1mancompany.github.io/OneManCompany/docs/reference/task-system/

## Comparison

Unlike other AI agent frameworks that provide SDKs or APIs for building agents, OneManCompany provides a complete organizational simulation. You don't write code to define agents — you manage a company. The difference is like the difference between a hiring API and an actual HR department.
